responses: Hello! How can I help with your health today?
Hi there! Tell me about your symptoms.
You may have a fever. Stay hydrated and consult a doctor if it persists above 103°F or lasts more than 3 days.
Fever detected. Rest well and monitor your temperature. Seek immediate medical help if above 103°F or accompanied by severe symptoms.
It looks like a common cold. Rest and drink warm fluids. Most colds resolve in 7-10 days.
Cold symptoms identified. Stay warm, rest, and drink plenty of water. Consult a doctor if symptoms worsen or persist beyond 10 days.
Take rest in a quiet, dark room and stay hydrated. Seek medical help if severe or persistent.
Headache noted. Try relaxation techniques and rest. Consult a doctor if accompanied by vision changes, fever, or neck stiffness.
Avoid spicy and heavy foods. Try light meals and stay hydrated. Consult a doctor if pain is severe or persistent.
Stomach discomfort detected. Try bland foods (rice, bananas, toast) and rest. Seek medical help if pain intensifies or includes vomiting.
Please get tested immediately and isolate. Monitor your oxygen levels if possible. Seek emergency care for severe breathing difficulty.
COVID-19 symptoms detected. Get tested as soon as possible and follow local health guidelines. Contact a healthcare provider for guidance.
I can give basic guidance for common symptoms like fever, cold, headache, stomach pain, and more. For complex queries, I use AI to provide general health information.
I provide preliminary health guidance based on symptoms. I use deep learning for common cases and AI assistance for complex questions. Remember, I'm not a replacement for medical diagnosis.
Take care! Stay healthy and consult a doctor for serious symptoms.
Goodbye! Remember to seek professional medical advice when needed.
Stay well! Feel free to return anytime you need health guidance.
